title: 10 best herbal creams for vomiting
description: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, creams helps with vomiting because of its natural digestive properties. The menthol content in peppermint creams helps to relax the stomach muscles, reducing nausea and discomfort. Additionally, the cooling sensation it provides can help to calm the digestive tract, reducing the urge to vomit. This makes peppermint creams a popular natural remedy for relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, motion sickness, and other conditions that c...
